name: 100% Whole Wheat Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
Water (1 1/2 cups), Wheat bread flour (3 3/4 cups), Dry milk (2 tablespoons), Salt (1 1/2 teaspoons), Butter (2 tablespoons), Honey (2 tablespoons), Gluten (1 1/2 tablespoons), Molasses (1 tablespoon), Fast-Rise yeast (2 1/8 teaspoons)  OR
Active-Dry yeast (3 teaspoons)
The trick to making 100% whole wheat bread in your machine is an extra knead, which gives the yeast and gluten a second chance to create a lighter loaf. When your first knead cycle is completed, simply reset the machine and start again. Some manufacturers produce home bakeries with a whole wheat cycle; if your machine doesn't have one, this start-again method works as an easy alternative. SUCCESS HINTS:
The gluten gives the whole wheat flour the structure necessary for a good loaf. If your market doesn't stock wheat gluten, try your local health food store.
Remember the extra knead. It's especially important in 100% whole wheat bread.
Because of the extra knead, use this recipe only on the regular bake cycle.
